posts.author: kpatel (K Patel )
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day all,

I am reaching out to you all to ask for your suggestions and expertise. I am building dashboard where I want to add sharepoint links, demo recordings and confluence links for quick access. Is there any widget I should use? Or any other idea to make it look pretty and provide easy access to everyone.

Thank you!

posts.author: robert2001b (robert)
posts.cookedHtml:
K Patel :

I am reaching out to you all to ask for your suggestions and expertise. I am building dashboard where I want to add sharepoint links, demo recordings and confluence links for quick access. Is there any widget I should use? Or any other idea to make it look pretty and provide easy access to everyone.

If you’re using Jira gadgets, Custom Charts has a Confluence version that works as a macro. You can create charts directly in your Confluence pages by linking your desired Jira instance. Additionally, they offer a Shared Dashboard feature for a customized dashboard experience that you can share with your team or link in Confluence pages.

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: @kpatel You could use the Text widget, which allows adding links.
